policy.note: This guard validates the local worker execution runbook only. It does not execute local models or read private worker output contents.

findings.message: Runbook status must be idle review-only or explicitly list executable tasks.
Runbook must be runbook-only.
Runbook must not start models.
Runbook must not read private outputs.
Runbook must not read private sources.
Runbook must not write worker outputs.
Runbook must not write Git.
Runbook must not write cloud.
Runbook must keep public-ready at 0.
Summary task count must match task rows.
Present + missing outputs must equal total tasks.
Runner-safe count must match task rows.
Private-context blocker count must match task rows.
Executable-now count must match task rows.
Summary public-ready after runbook must be 0.
Launch queue must be idle or explicitly launchable.
Repo conversion must remain 0.
HTTP runner check must pass.
HTTP runner check failures must be 0.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-private-doctrine-summary output status must be known.
kosmo-private-doctrine-summary must explain why it is blocked.
kosmo-private-doctrine-summary must not expose safe_command when blocked.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-reference-pilot-gap-map output status must be known.
kosmo-reference-pilot-gap-map cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-reference-pilot-gap-map needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-reference-pilot-gap-map output-present decision must match present output.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-book-library-mount-questions output status must be known.
kosmo-book-library-mount-questions cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-book-library-mount-questions needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-book-library-mount-questions output-present decision must match present output.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-asset-seed-candidates output status must be known.
kosmo-asset-seed-candidates cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-asset-seed-candidates needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-asset-seed-candidates output-present decision must match present output.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-public-source-link-synthesis output status must be known.
kosmo-public-source-link-synthesis cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-public-source-link-synthesis needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-public-source-link-synthesis output-present decision must match present output.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-asset-source-candidate-triage output status must be known.
kosmo-asset-source-candidate-triage cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-asset-source-candidate-triage needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-asset-source-candidate-triage output-present decision must match present output.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-human-decision-queue-triage output status must be known.
kosmo-human-decision-queue-triage cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-human-decision-queue-triage needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-human-decision-queue-triage output-present decision must match present output.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-owner-batch-review-questions output status must be known.
kosmo-owner-batch-review-questions cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-owner-batch-review-questions needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-owner-batch-review-questions output-present decision must match present output.
Each task must have an id.
kosmo-owner-session-safe-next-tasks output status must be known.
kosmo-owner-session-safe-next-tasks cannot be runner-safe while blockers exist.
kosmo-owner-session-safe-next-tasks needs a safe command when runner-safe.
kosmo-owner-session-safe-next-tasks output-present decision must match present output.
Dry-run command template must use HTTP runner.
Execute command template must include --execute.
Force command template must include --force.
Command templates must not include Git or cloud writes.

next_actions: Use the execution runbook as the safe command map for future local worker runs.
Do not execute local worker tasks while executable_now is 0.
Rerun this guard after task-pack, launch queue, conversion plan or runner-check changes.
